title: MARK ZUCKERBERG: Free Speech (English Subtitles)

Jun 2, 2023 • 22 min

# ENGLISH SPEECH | MARK ZUCKERBERG: Free Speech (English Subtitles)

Learn English with Mark Zuckerberg. In this enlightening talk, Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg addresses students at Georgetown University, discussing the importance of free expression and its role in our society. This event, held on October 17, 2019, marked the beginning of a new series of public conversations called "Democracy in the Digital Age." Zuckerberg's speech offers a deep dive into the challenges and opportunities for democracy in the digital era, emphasizing the power of individual voices in shaping society. As one of the most influential figures in the tech industry, Zuckerberg's insights are invaluable for anyone interested in the intersection of technology, politics, and social change. ✅ Here is a free LESSON, TRANSCRIPT, and AUDIO to help you learn English: [https://www.englishspeecheschannel.co...](https://www.englishspeecheschannel.com/english-speeches/mark-zuckerberg-2020) ✅ Also, download our FREE English eBooks: [https://www.englishspeecheschannel.co...](https://www.englishspeecheschannel.com/english-ebooks) ✅ Subscribe to our NEWSLETTER: [https://englishspeeches.beehiiv.com/s...](https://englishspeeches.beehiiv.com/subscribe) ❤️ SUBSCRIBE to our channels: 👉🏽 English Speeches: [https://www.youtube.com/englishspeech...](https://www.youtube.com/englishspeeches?sub_confirmation=1) 👉🏽 Learn English: [https://www.youtube.com/LearnEnglishw...](https://www.youtube.com/LearnEnglishwithSpeeches?sub_confirmation=1) 👉🏽 Timeline | Biographies & Quotes: [https://www.youtube.com/BiographyTime...](https://www.youtube.com/BiographyTimeline?sub_confirmation=1) 👉🏽 English Quotes (shorts) [https://www.youtube.com/EnglishQuotes...](https://www.youtube.com/EnglishQuotesShorts?sub_confirmation=1) 👉🏽 Bible 365 Study: [https://www.youtube.com/bible365study...](https://www.youtube.com/bible365study?sub_confirmation=1) 👉🏽 Telegram Channel: <https://t.me/EnSpeeches> ✅ Become a channel member.
